question: Where is the green gate located in the image? Select from the following options: (A) On the left side of the image. (B) In the center of the image. (C) On the right side of the image. (D) The gate cannot be seen in the image.
gold_answer: On the right side of the image
answer_choices: On the left side of the image
In the center of the image
On the right side of the image
The gate cannot be seen in the image
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
